prompt: Create a Remotion insurance claims risk matrix with four claim categories, severity and frequency axes, animated cells, and a reserve-risk summary badge.
Create a Remotion manufacturing OEE dashboard with availability, performance, and quality gauges, a small downtime bar chart, and a production line status strip.
Create a Remotion personal finance budget split with a donut-style SVG allocation chart, five category labels, and a savings-rate callout.
Create a Remotion real-estate comp map with four property cards, a simple SVG neighborhood map, price-per-square-foot labels, and a highlighted best-value comp.
Create a Remotion game analytics retention cohort view with four cohorts, day-one/day-seven/day-thirty cells, an animated highlight row, and a churn-risk badge.
Create a Remotion travel operations delay board with five route rows, delay chips, a network status meter, and a small animated route sparkline.
